name: FOUR PAWS Australia
summary: Animal welfare organisation revealing suffering, rescuing animals and campaigning for animals under human influence.
description: Relevant for farmed-animal welfare, companion animals, wildlife, disaster response and international campaign expertise.
alignment: Listed because its welfare and rescue work overlaps with Bite Back's evidence and reform campaigns.
